domain.label: Domain
domain.description: Pipedrive domain. This is found in Pipedrive in Settings > Company settings > Company domain.

apiToken.label: API Token
apiToken.description: Pipedrive API token. This is found in Pipedrive in Settings > Personal preferences > API > Your personal API token.

personField.label: External ID field for a Person in Pipedrive
personField.description: This is a key by which a Person in Pipedrive will be searched. It can be either Person id or has of a custom field containing external id. Default value is `person_id`.

organizationField.label: External ID field for an Organization in Pipedrive
organizationField.description: This is a key by which an Organization in Pipedrive will be searched. It can be either Organization id or has of a custom field containing external id. Default value is `org_id`.

dealField.label: External ID field for a Deal in Pipedrive
dealField.description: This is a key by which a Deal in Pipedrive will be searched. It can be either Deal id or has of a custom field containing external id. Default value is `deal_id`.

createUpdateOrganization.title: Create or Update Organization
createUpdateOrganization.description: Update an organization in Pipedrive or create it if it doesn't exist yet.

match_field.label: Match field
match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

match_value.label: Match value
match_value.description: Value to find existing organization by

visible_to.label: Visible To
visible_to.description: Visibility of the Organization. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

add_time.label: Created At
add_time.description: If the organization is created, use this timestamp as the creation timestamp. Format: YYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

createUpdatePerson.title: Create or Update Person
createUpdatePerson.description: Update a person in Pipedrive or create them if they don't exist yet.

match_field.label: Match field
match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

match_value.label: Match value
match_value.description: Value to find existing person by

visible_to.label: Visible To
visible_to.description: Visibility of the Person. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

add_time.label: Created At
add_time.description: If the person is created, use this timestamp as the creation timestamp. Format: YYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

createUpdateActivity.title: Create or update an Activity
createUpdateActivity.description: Update an Activity in Pipedrive or create one if it doesn't exist.

activity_id.label: Activity ID
activity_id.description: ID of Activity in Pipedrive to Update. If left empty, a new one will be created

person_match_field.label: Person match field
person_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

person_match_value.label: Person match value
person_match_value.description: Value to find existing person by

organization_match_field.label: Organization match field
organization_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

organization_match_value.label: Organization match value
organization_match_value.description: Value to find existing organization by

deal_match_field.label: Deal match field
deal_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing deal in Pipedrive.

deal_match_value.label: Deal match value
deal_match_value.description: Value to find existing deal by

subject.label: Activity Subject
subject.description: Subject of the Activity. When value for subject is not set, it will be given a default value `Call`.

type.label: Type
type.description: Type of the Activity. This is in correlation with the key_string parameter of ActivityTypes. When value for type is not set, it will be given a default value `Call`

description.label: Description
description.description: Additional details about the Activity that is synced to your external calendar. Unlike the note added to the Activity, the description is publicly visible to any guests added to the Activity.

note.label: Note
note.description: Note of the Activity (Accepts plain text and HTML)

due_date.label: Due Date
due_date.description: Due date of the Activity. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

due_time.label: Due Time
due_time.description: Due time of the Activity. Format: HH:MM

duration.label: Duration
duration.description: Duration of the Activity. Format: HH:MM

done.label: Done
done.description: Whether the Activity is done or not.

createUpdateDeal.title: Create or update a Deal
createUpdateDeal.description: Update a Deal in Pipedrive or create it if it doesn't exist yet.

deal_match_field.label: Deal match field
deal_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing deal in Pipedrive.

deal_match_value.label: Deal match value
deal_match_value.description: Value to find existing deal by

person_match_field.label: Person match field
person_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

person_match_value.label: Person match value
person_match_value.description: Value to find existing person by. Required unless organization_match_value present

organization_match_field.label: Organization match field
organization_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

organization_match_value.label: Organization match value
organization_match_value.description: Value to find existing organization by. Required unless person_match_value present

value.label: Value
value.description: Value of the deal. If omitted, value will be set to 0.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the deal. Accepts a 3-character currency code. If omitted, currency will be set to the default currency of the authorized user.

stage_id.label: Stage ID
stage_id.description: The ID of a stage this Deal will be placed in a pipeline (note that you can't supply the ID of the pipeline as this will be assigned automatically based on stage_id). If omitted, the deal will be placed in the first stage of the default pipeline.

status.label: Status
status.description: Deal status - open, won, lost or deleted. If omitted, status will be set to open.

expected_close_date.label: Expected Close Date
expected_close_date.description: The expected close date of the Deal. In ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD.

probability.label: Success Probability
probability.description: Deal success probability percentage. Used/shown only when deal_probability for the pipeline of the deal is enabled.

lost_reason.label: Lost Reason
lost_reason.description: Optional message about why the deal was lost (to be used when status=lost)

visible_to.label: Visible To
visible_to.description: Visibility of the deal. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

add_time.label: Created At
add_time.description: If the deal is created, use this timestamp as the creation timestamp. Format: YYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

createUpdateLead.title: Create or update Lead
createUpdateLead.description: Update a Lead in Pipedrive or create it if it doesn't exist yet.

lead_id.label: Lead ID
lead_id.description: ID of Lead in Pipedrive to Update. If left empty, a new one will be created

person_match_field.label: Person match field
person_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

person_match_value.label: Person match value
person_match_value.description: Value to find existing person by. Required unless organization_match_value present

organization_match_field.label: Organization match field
organization_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

organization_match_value.label: Organization match value
organization_match_value.description: Value to find existing organization by. Required unless person_match_value present

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Three-letter code of the currency, e.g. USD

expected_close_date.label: Expected Close Date
expected_close_date.description: The date of when the Deal which will be created from the Lead is expected to be closed. In ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD.

visible_to.label: Visible To
visible_to.description: Visibility of the Lead. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

createUpdateNote.title: Create or update a Note
createUpdateNote.description: Update a Note in Pipedrive or create it if it doesn't exist yet.

note_id.label: Note ID
note_id.description: ID of Note in Pipedrive to Update. If left empty, a new one will be created

lead_id.label: Lead ID
lead_id.description: ID of Lead in Pipedrive to link to. One of Lead, Person, Organization or Deal must be linked!

person_match_field.label: Person match field
person_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

person_match_value.label: Person match value
person_match_value.description: Value to find existing person by. One of Lead, Person, Organization or Deal must be linked!

organization_match_field.label: Organization match field
organization_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

organization_match_value.label: Organization match value
organization_match_value.description: Value to find existing organization by. One of Lead, Person, Organization or Deal must be linked!

deal_match_field.label: Deal match field
deal_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing deal in Pipedrive.

deal_match_value.label: Deal match value
deal_match_value.description: Value to find existing deal by. One of Lead, Person, Organization or Deal must be linked!

content.label: Note Content
content.description: Content of the note in text or HTML format. Subject to sanitization on the back-end.
